title: Git Version Control Integration
content:
This module provides functionality for interacting with Git repositories within the TwitchPokemon project.

It allows pip to clone, update, and manage dependencies from Git repositories, supporting various URL schemes and revision specifications.

## Key Exports/Functions:

*   **`Git` class**: Inherits from `VersionControl` and implements Git-specific operations.
    *   `get_base_rev_args(rev)`: Returns arguments for specifying a revision.
    *   `get_git_version()`: Retrieves and parses the installed Git version.
    *   `get_current_branch(location)`: Returns the name of the current Git branch.
    *   `export(location, url)`: Exports a Git repository to a local directory.
    *   `get_revision_sha(dest, rev)`: Resolves a revision name to its SHA hash and whether it's a branch.
    *   `resolve_revision(dest, url, rev_options)`: Resolves a revision to a commit SHA and updates `RevOptions`.
    *   `is_commit_id_equal(dest, name)`: Checks if the current commit hash matches a given name.
    *   `fetch_new(dest, url, rev_options)`: Clones a new repository or fetches updates.
    *   `switch(dest, url, rev_options)`: Switches the repository to a different URL and revision.
    *   `update(dest, url, rev_options)`: Updates the repository to the latest changes and resets to the specified revision.
    *   `get_remote_url(location)`: Retrieves the URL of the first configured remote.
    *   `get_revision(location, rev)`: Gets the SHA hash of a given revision.
    *   `get_subdirectory(location)`: Determines if the repository is a subdirectory within a larger Git repository.
    *   `get_url_rev_and_auth(url)`: Parses Git URLs, handling SSH prefixes and authentication details.
    *   `update_submodules(location)`: Updates Git submodules.
    *   `controls_location(location)`: Checks if a given location is under Git control.

## Usage Example:

```python
from pip._internal.vcs.git import Git

# Example of cloning a repository
# Assume 'temp_repo_dir' is an empty directory
# Git.fetch_new(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options)

# Example of checking out a specific branch
# Git.switch(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options_for_branch)

# Example of updating an existing repository
# Git.update(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options_for_update)
```

versions.title: Git Version Control Integration
versions.content:
This module provides functionality for interacting with Git repositories within the TwitchPokemon project.

It allows pip to clone, update, and manage dependencies from Git repositories, supporting various URL schemes and revision specifications.

## Key Exports/Functions:

*   **`Git` class**: Inherits from `VersionControl` and implements Git-specific operations.
    *   `get_base_rev_args(rev)`: Returns arguments for specifying a revision.
    *   `get_git_version()`: Retrieves and parses the installed Git version.
    *   `get_current_branch(location)`: Returns the name of the current Git branch.
    *   `export(location, url)`: Exports a Git repository to a local directory.
    *   `get_revision_sha(dest, rev)`: Resolves a revision name to its SHA hash and whether it's a branch.
    *   `resolve_revision(dest, url, rev_options)`: Resolves a revision to a commit SHA and updates `RevOptions`.
    *   `is_commit_id_equal(dest, name)`: Checks if the current commit hash matches a given name.
    *   `fetch_new(dest, url, rev_options)`: Clones a new repository or fetches updates.
    *   `switch(dest, url, rev_options)`: Switches the repository to a different URL and revision.
    *   `update(dest, url, rev_options)`: Updates the repository to the latest changes and resets to the specified revision.
    *   `get_remote_url(location)`: Retrieves the URL of the first configured remote.
    *   `get_revision(location, rev)`: Gets the SHA hash of a given revision.
    *   `get_subdirectory(location)`: Determines if the repository is a subdirectory within a larger Git repository.
    *   `get_url_rev_and_auth(url)`: Parses Git URLs, handling SSH prefixes and authentication details.
    *   `update_submodules(location)`: Updates Git submodules.
    *   `controls_location(location)`: Checks if a given location is under Git control.

## Usage Example:

```python
from pip._internal.vcs.git import Git

# Example of cloning a repository
# Assume 'temp_repo_dir' is an empty directory
# Git.fetch_new(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options)

# Example of checking out a specific branch
# Git.switch(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options_for_branch)

# Example of updating an existing repository
# Git.update(temp_repo_dir, "https://github.com/user/repo.git", rev_options_for_update)
```
